messages.content: I want to build a successful startup and launch my MVP in 3 months
That's an exciting goal! Let's break it down...
I'm trying to code every day but struggling with consistency
Consistency is key for habit formation...
My biggest problem with procrastination is starting tasks
I value growth mindset and continuous learning above everything
Every day I meditate in the morning to stay focused
Morning meditation is an excellent habit...
I want to learn AI and machine learning deeply
AI/ML is a great field to pursue...
I find it hard to maintain work-life balance
Work-life balance is challenging for entrepreneurs...
I always try to stay disciplined with my daily routine
